query: We need to add pre-submission validation that checks NCCI edits before a claim goes out — if two CPT codes are bundled, flag it before submission
What's the timely filing deadline for UnitedHealthcare? We need to set up auto-escalation alerts at 75%, 90%, and 95% of the deadline
I'm building the denial prediction module — what are the top reasons claims get denied and which ones can we prevent with AI?
The coding agent needs to check medical necessity for inpatient admission — the two-midnight rule requires documentation of expected LOS >= 2 midnights
Can you add prior auth requirement checking? When a coder is reviewing CPT 27447 (total knee replacement), we should flag that all major payers require PA
I need to write an appeal letter for a medical necessity denial on MRI spine — the LCD requires documented radiculopathy and 4-6 weeks failed conservative care
We're getting a lot of duplicate claim denials — can you add deduplication logic that checks if a claim was already submitted before allowing resubmission?
The claim validation module needs to check for missing information — modifier, referring provider, POS code are the top three fields that cause denials when missing
86% of PA denials are overturned on appeal per AMA 2023 — can we build an automated appeal letter generator using the PROMPT-004 template?
I need to add payer-specific bundling rules beyond NCCI — Anthem has their own bundling edits for outpatient procedures that differ from CMS
Can you implement real-time eligibility verification? We need to check patient coverage before the service date to prevent eligibility denials
The LCD for cardiac catheterization (CPT 93451) requires an abnormal stress test or acute coronary syndrome — our system should validate this before submission
I need to calculate the DRG revenue impact of adding N17.9 to an encounter with principal diagnosis I50.9
Can you fix the Excludes 1 validation in the ICD-10 rules engine? It's letting through E10.x and E11.x together
I need to write an AHIMA-compliant CDI query for heart failure without type specification
The FHIR client needs to handle Epic's 5-minute token expiry and proactively refresh
Can you add a structlog PHI filter that blocks patient MRNs from appearing in log entries?
I need to update the NLP section parser to handle C-CDA XML format from Epic's DocumentReference
The coding agent confidence threshold of 0.65 seems too high — can we add a configurable threshold in the settings?
Can you refactor the DRGGrouper class to use a JSON data file instead of hardcoded weight dictionaries?
